name: helix-dbtl
description: Helix — a Design·Build·Test·Learn copilot. Stand up a closed-loop Bayesian-optimization backbone for wet-lab campaigns: compile a plain-language brief into a typed spec, propose the next experiments with uncertainty and a rationale, ingest assay results, and see experiments saved vs. random. Bundles a skill, a workflow, a hook, and an MCP server.
